title: Anonymous Crypto Payments for Digital Products: What It Actually Is and How It Works — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: Selling digital products online without PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, or Payhip can be daunting, especially for creators in restricted countries like Nigeria or Pakistan. But what if you could take control of your sales and payouts, using a secure and reliable method? With anonymous crypto payments, you can sell your ebooks, courses, and digital products without the need for these traditional payment processors. In this post, we'll break down what this technology is, how it works, and how you can start using it today.
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

Anonymous crypto payments are a type of digital payment system that uses blockchain technology to facilitate transactions between buyers and sellers. This system allows for secure, fast, and borderless transactions, making it an attractive option for creators who are restricted from using traditional payment processors. By using anonymous crypto payments, you can maintain control over your sales and payouts, without the need for intermediaries. This means you can focus on creating and selling your digital products, without worrying about platform restrictions or fees.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

At the heart of anonymous crypto payments is the Core Shop Engine, a full-backend system that automates delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipts. This system uses a combination of blockchain technology and artificial intelligence to ensure that transactions are secure and reliable. When a buyer makes a purchase, the Core Shop Engine verifies the payment and automates the delivery of the digital product, without the need for manual intervention. This means you can focus on creating and selling your products, while the Core Shop Engine handles the logistics.
Who This Is Built For and Why

The Core Shop Engine is built for creators who are restricted from using traditional payment processors, such as those in Nigeria, Pakistan, or other countries with strict banking regulations. It's also a great option for solo developers who want to build a custom e-commerce platform for their digital products. By using the Core Shop Engine, you can take control of your sales and payouts, without the need for intermediaries or high fees.
Anonymous crypto payments offer a secure and reliable way to sell digital products without the need for traditional payment processors.
The Components That Make It Work Together

The Core Shop Engine is made up of several key components, including the web3 wallet connect, which integrates with popular cryptocurrency wallets, and the admin dashboard, which provides real-time analytics and order management. The system also uses a payment processor, such as NOWPayments, which supports over 300 cryptocurrencies and doesn't require a buyer account. This means you can focus on creating and selling your products, while the Core Shop Engine handles the logistics.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action

To start using anonymous crypto payments, you'll need to sign up for a Core Shop Engine account and configure your store. This involves setting up your payment processor, integrating your web3 wallet connect, and configuring your admin dashboard. Once you've completed these steps, you can start selling your digital products and receiving secure, fast, and borderless transactions. To get started, visit https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html and explore the Core Shop Engine, the ultimate solution for creators who want to take control of their sales and payouts.
